intent: Represent a household where most inflow is committed to essentials shortly after deposit.
expectedEvaluatorBehavior: Evaluator should show tight liquidity cycles and limited flexibility between pay periods.
customerProfileSummary: Essentials-first household profile with recurring dips before the next paycheck.
whatToLookFor: Tight cash-pressure cycles, low headroom, and sensitivity to subscription/debit timing.
realWorldPattern: Income arrives regularly but is consumed quickly by mandatory obligations.
sanitizedNotice: No real users, accounts, identifiers, or production records are included.
